title: Linking clients to a Practice Dashboard
summaryBody: Allow accountants/bookkeepers to self-serve linking client accounts to their Practice Dashboard, to save time, lessen their frustrations, and reduce mistakes.
detailBody: Allow accountants/bookkeepers to self-serve linking client accounts to their Practice Dashboard, to save time, lessen their frustrations, and reduce mistakes.
